payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Varnished dark-brown wooden cabinet door filling most of the crop, with a recessed rectangular center panel, vertical wood grain and a glossy finish showing subtle reflections; small metallic knob or reflective spot near the lower center is visible; appears intact and was likely photographed from roughly 1.0 m.
attributes: small metallic knob or reflective spot near lower center
